description: Recommerce Group provides trade-in, refurbishment, repair, and resale solutions for refurbished devices and related circular-economy programs. Its website describes services for retailers, businesses, and public administrations.
summary: No publicly documented developer integration surfaces were found on recommerce-group.com; the site markets trade-in and resale solutions and mentions API/MCP compatibility but provides no public API, GraphQL, MCP endpoint, CLI, spec, or authentication documentation on this domain.
